title: Constraint
description: Constraints on a variable. All variables must have a type, and they may also be constrained to a set of values.

ids.description: The possible values of the variable. `None` means the variable can be any value. `Some(["foo"])` means the variable must be exactly `"foo"`. `Some(["foo", "bar"])` means the variable can be either `"foo"` or `"bar"`. The latter is how we represent `In` expressions in the new Query API.
